_meta.title: 3岁儿童英语词汇与句子库
_meta.description: 基于CDI（MacArthur-Bates量表）22个词汇类别和儿童语言发展研究整理
references: CDI Words & Sentences 完整680词/22类别对照审查 (2023版)
Fenson et al. (2007) MacArthur-Bates CDI: 680词/22类别
CDI-III (30-37个月): 中位数产出573个不同词汇
3岁儿童能说3-6个词的句子，75%可被熟悉者理解
Fry Sight Words: 最高频1000词覆盖90%日常文本
_meta.note: emoji为可选字段，无emoji的词汇用文字卡片展示

sentences.text: I need to brush my teeth.
It is cold. Wear a coat.
Can we go to the park?
I want to pick a flower.
What sound does a cow make?
The duck is in the water.
I am scared of the dark.
I want to play with my friend.
I want to go to the zoo.
We are going to the park.
I like it because it is pretty.
I want to but I can't.
If you want, you can have some.
